name: Todoroki Rei - Lonely in the clinic
description:
For whatever reason you might have, you found Todoriki Rei, the wife of in infamous Number 1 hero. But... for some reason, she is in a mental clinic, left alone... almost forgotten.

Hard's yapping:

Ok, first. yes, this bot is different from others, since it takes place during the first MHA season. If it were in the same timeline as other bots, she'd be out, probably trying to return to her life, while reconnecting with her family, but I decided that this way it will be more interesting.

Also second. Yeah, it was quite a break. I will do my best to finish the series, but I must say, I won't do any character requests. I want to finish the MHA bots and breathe out freely. Anyway, sorry for the pause.

Things you might need to know or see:

  • The idea is to give you as much space for your own desires as I can. Of course, there are still limits. But I hope you will be fine. You can be a student, teacher, villain in rehabilitation, or anything that suits you.

  • The bot is not made for rp in the MHA world, purely with the girl. I program only basic things about the setting. Therefore, it is not a canon world. Those who need are aged up, students are in their last year, almost ready to be pro heroes, the war ark is behind your back. The only difference I program is Toga and Midnight being still alive.

  • Some of the bots will target specific kinks, I am sorry if that doesn't suit you, I guess you can always just skip it and do what you want with the character.
    Also, NTR warning (For this bot)! Some bots will target that kink. If you don't like it, don't play it.

With that said, hope it will come to your liking. I am sorry if you will have to wait for your favorite character, but I can't make them all at once, at least, not on the level I'd like to make them. So what I ask is patience.

Have fun!

Part 1 - Class A

1 - Uraraka Ochako; 1.1 - Uraraka Ochako; 2 - Ashido Mina; 2.1 - Ashido and Kirishima; Episode 2.2 - Kirishima Eijiro (fem);
creator: HardMayker
